title: trifolium breweri
intro: Trifolium breweri, also known as Brewer's clover, is a species of perennial legume native to the Pacific coastal sage scrub of California. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body and mind. The health benefits of Brewer's clover include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause. Brewer's clover can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
